calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, November 5, 2015, in Department 525:
Mohammad Iqbal, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness/Urdu interpreter Zain Choudhary and witness Aum Rukhsana Dasnim.
Mark Rinderer, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witness Dave Burns.

The clerk administers the interpreter's oath to Zain Choudhary to translate the English language into Urdu language and vice versa.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Mohammad Iqbal testifies on his own behalf through Urdu interpreter Zain Choudhary and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - group exhibits: agreement and letter from Mark; letter from Mr. Iqbal, Teriq C, and etc.; decision of labor commissioner.

Appellant/Defendant, Mark Rinderer testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. Dave Burns testifies on behalf of Mark Rinderer and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence of Mr. Iqbal's retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Continued To Sep-24-15 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Continued To Jul-15-15 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-10-2015 Judgment Entered
